recommendations.action: Activate real-service nightly CI tier — configure PLAYWRIGHT_REAL_SERVICE=1, DAYTONA_API_KEY, ANTHROPIC_API_KEY, real GitHub OAuth credentials in nightly CI secrets so the 5 new real-service E2E specs + existing functional-smoke + nfr-performance + nfr-p5-manual-commit run.
PM escalation path for NFR latency — if NFR-P1 >1,500ms or NFR-P2 >10s in the first real-service run, escalate to PM (transport hops may require target revision per atdd-checklist-6-5:308-310).
Trace Epics 4 and 5 separately — currently untraced (done per sprint-status.yaml but AC-to-test mapping not validated). Schedule a separate trace run.
Run suite-wide test review — agent-be suite grew ~216 new unit tests during Epic 6; assess determinism, isolation, run time, file size (<300 lines).
Activate the 3 pre-existing PR-tier env-gated skips (sign-in OAuth navigation, org OAuth App restriction, token visibility) by setting up a test GitHub org.
